title: cola coccinea
intro: Cola coccinea, also known as the red cola plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a purgative and to treat digestive issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cola coccinea is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
